shopping_engine_pack_v1.description: Single entrypoint manifest for AHVI Shopping Intelligence. Loads router, purchase conviction (3 outfit combos), wardrobe tag normalizer, compare/dupe/gap stubs, and test suite. Designed to integrate with styling + tone engines without duplicating responsibilities.
runtime_order: NLU → signals (detect shopping intent + category + color + compare/dupe keywords)
extract product_candidate (from link/image/text) OR ask 1 clarifying question
shopping_router selects mode (compare > conviction > style_with_it > dupe > gap > fallback)
selected engine produces response payload (combos + why + question close)
post-compose safety clamp (tone engine + style safety rules if applicable)

constraints: no extra selling lines unless user asked should_i_buy

fallback_behavior.if_missing_optional_engines: Router must skip missing optional engine files and fall back to shopping_decision_engine.
fallback_behavior.if_missing_shared_dependencies: Proceed without those enhancements; do not crash.

dev_notes: Shopping engine owns purchase persuasion + outfit combos tied to a product.
Styling engine owns outfit critique, silhouettes, and occasion overlays unless shopping engine explicitly requests them as shared dependencies.
Wardrobe tag normalizer is required for wardrobe-first matching; if not available, conviction engine must still return 3 generic combos based on vibe/occasion.
Tone engine controls lingo by age; do not mirror ALL CAPS or chaotic punctuation.
